Ross and Russ are heading to Paris for the Olympics, broadcasting3AW Breakfastlive on location from Monday July 29.

So it was only fitting for them to take a French class live on air before jetting off!

Founder and CEO of Cosmopoli French School Nathalie Marguerite lifted the lid on local culture, explaining why she believed English was easier to learn than French.

Click PLAY to hear how the French class played out on air



“It is the most beautiful language,” Ross said.

Image: Getty

Nine Radio is your home of the Paris 2024 Olympic Games – you won’t miss amomenton air and online from July 27.

title: Ross and Russ given French class before heading to Paris for the Olympics!
author: laurencerosen
